channel.title: Cybersecurity AI Framework Standards
channel.description: Static RSS feed for CAIF standards and framework updates.

item.title: CAF-AI-001 AI-Assisted Vulnerability Triage
item.description: Minimum evidence, review, and confidence requirements for AI-assisted vulnerability triage.

item.title: CAF-AI-002 Proof-of-Exploitability Evidence Standard
item.description: A consistent structure for reproducible, ethical proof-of-exploitability evidence.

item.title: CAF-AI-003 AI-Generated Security Report Standard
item.description: Requirements for explainable, verifiable AI-generated security reports.

item.title: CAF-AI-004 Secure Prompting for Security Testing
item.description: Prompting patterns for controlled, authorized security testing workflows.

item.title: CAF-AI-005 AI Model Risk in AppSec
item.description: Model, tool, and agentic workflow risks relevant to application security programs.

item.title: CAF-AI-006 Automated Remediation Review Standard
item.description: Review expectations for AI-generated remediation guidance and code changes.

item.title: CAF-AI-007 Human-in-the-loop Validation Standard
item.description: Roles, review gates, and evidence requirements for trusted human validation.
